note: alpha = median(passing-stocks forward-return) - median(failing-stocks forward-return). CI = 95% percentile bootstrap. Methods with evidenceGate != "ok" produce no CI. F-BT-006: alpha=null when n<10 in either group. Yahoo universe survivor-biased. F-BT-004: bootstrap seed is per-method-unique. F-PF-009: cache in method-effectiveness-cache.json.
